overall.description: First-person exploration through the Cyberpunk 2077 Badlands, traveling along a desert highway toward a distant futuristic metropolis with vertical light beams, then turning off-road to explore an abandoned stadium structure and passing beneath a massive industrial overpass.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the desert highway toward the distant city skyline with vertical light beams

entered.detail: futuristic city skyline with distinctive vertical light beams piercing the sky
large elevated satellite dish on a support structure
two-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines cutting through arid terrain
utility poles with overhead cables running parallel to the road
scattered desert yucca trees and dry brush

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert highway stretching toward a distant futuristic metropolis. The camera moves forward along the asphalt road, passing a large satellite dish structure on the left while Joshua trees dot the right side. Vertical light beams from the city pierce the clear blue sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert off-road approach to abandoned stadium

events.description: turns sharply right off the paved highway onto a dirt path

agents.ego_description: turns off the main road and approaches the abandoned stadium structure on foot

entered.detail: large abandoned building with classical columns and dark angular roof
unpaved desert trail with scattered rocks and sand

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right off the paved highway onto a dirt trail, leaving the road behind. The abandoned stadium structure comes into view ahead, featuring tall white columns against the desert landscape. The distant city skyline shifts to the left as the perspective changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved path around abandoned stadium toward industrial overpass

events.description: curves around the abandoned stadium building with increasing sun glare
ground surface transitions from dirt to concrete sidewalk alongside the road

agents.ego_description: curves around the stadium structure approaching an industrial overpass with sun glare intensifying

entered.detail: massive steel and concrete elevated highway structure with support pillars
paved walkway running parallel to the road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera curves around the abandoned stadium, passing it on the left as the sun creates strong glare. The ground transitions from dirt to concrete sidewalk. A massive industrial overpass looms ahead, supported by heavy steel pillars, while the distant city remains visible on the left horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial overpass underpass with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: enters the shadow beneath the industrial overpass structure
exits the overpass shadow back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: passes beneath the industrial overpass continuing along the concrete sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete industrial structure with blue accents and ventilation equipment
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art beneath the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera passes beneath the massive industrial overpass, moving through alternating shadows and light. Graffiti-covered walls line the left side as the concrete sidewalk continues forward. The overpass structure dominates overhead before the scene opens back into sunlight, with industrial buildings visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide desert highway toward a distant futuristic metropolis, eventually veering off-road into an industrial wasteland. It begins by gliding along the asphalt past a large satellite dish and scattered Joshua trees, with vertical light beams from the city piercing the clear blue sky. As the camera turns right onto a dirt trail, the paved road vanishes and the perspective shifts, bringing a stadium structure with tall white columns into view. The scene then curves around the stadium under a strong solar glare, transitioning from dirt to a concrete sidewalk before approaching a massive industrial overpass supported by heavy steel pillars. Finally, the camera passes beneath the overpass through alternating shadows and graffiti-covered walls, emerging back into the sunlight beside a cluster of industrial buildings.
